name: Lamb Karahi
description: Delicately cooked in caramelised onions, tomatoes, bell pepper, fresh green chilli, garlic and ginger.

name: Lamb Jalfrezi
description: Julienne of ginger, tomato and bell peppers in a tangy sauce tempered with carom seeds.

name: Old School Lamb Curry
description: Simple by today's standards, but 60 years ago this dish was a revelation to the good folks of Edinburgh. Slow cooked lamb with onion, tomato, ginger, garlic and lots of love.

name: Lamb Korma
description: Mildly spiced lamb cooked with tomato, onion, cashew nuts, almond and cooked with fresh cream to finish.

name: Lamb Saag
description: Cooked with aromatic spices and infused in a sauce made with fresh spinach, garlic and tempering of cumin.

name: Punjabi Gosht (on the bone)
description: Traditional home-style cooking. Make it your own by adding potato, mushroom or green peas (+70p per addition).

name: Kodambakkam Curry
description: Fresh coconut, panch puran (5 spices) finished with cream. A South Indian classic.

name: Lamb Makhanwala
description: A staple Indian dish with a smooth and velvety vine tomato, cashew nuts, honey and cream based sauce.

name: Keema Mattar
description: Fresh minced lamb cooked with onion, tomatoes, ginger and garlic along with green peas, garam masala and a touch of green chilli.
